zh.lifeSummary: Roger De Bradbourne II於1348年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可尼維頓。他於1360年之前與Bradbourne I在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1403年在英國德比夏爾布拉德布恩享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾布拉德布恩。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bradbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bradburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Bradbourne in Derbyshire or occasionally from Brabourne in Kent, both named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Roger De Bradbourne II was born in 1348, in Kniveton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Bradbourne I before 1360, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1403, in Bradbourne, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Bradbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il est décédé en 1403, à Bradbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Bradbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger De Bradbourne IIは1348年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアニベトンで生まれた。1360年以前にイギリスでBradbourne Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1403年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアブラドボウルンで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアブラドボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger De Bradbourne II(은)는 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 니베턴에서 태어났다. 그는 1360년 이전 영국에서 Bradbourne I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1403년 영국 더비실르 브라드보우른에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 브라드보우른에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger De Bradbourne II родился в 1348 г. в местности ниветон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Bradbourne I перед 1360 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1403 г. в местности брадбурн, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности брадбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
